{{Quote|<s></s>''Duracrud''! That's a stock why-vee six-six-six older than I am. It's a brick with wings and a hull that leaks gases like a flatulent Hutt.|[[Uran Lavint]] about the ''Duracrud'' aboard the ''Anakin Solo''|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Duracrud''''' was a [[YV-666 light freighter/Legends|YV-666]] given to Uran Lavint after her capture by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], in recompense for the appropriation of her usual ship, ''[[Breathe My Jets]]''. When she insulted him, Jacen ordered that the hyperdrive should be sabotaged to fail upon a second jump, knowing that smugglers usually jumped to a remote location before continuing onto their destination. However, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Alema Rar]] had stowed away in the hold, trusting that Lavint would be able to help her track down [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]]. Alema helped her repair the hyperdrive in exchange for her help.

The two took the ''Duracrud'' to the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' in order to hunt for the Solos. However [[Booster Terrik]] and a team including the Solos, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Antilles]], [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Jagged Fel]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] all sprung an ambush, forcing Alema to steal the ''Duracrud'' to make her escape.

The freighter was then piloted by Alema to [[Gilatter VIII]], where she knew that the [[Confederation]] summit was being held. Lavint had informed her that the Solos would be present, and then informed the Solos that Alema would be present as heads-up to the family. When [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] was trapped aboard a satellite resort by the Confederation, the Solos flew to the dome to rescue him with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Skywalker]]. Alema set the ''Duracrud'' up among the other parked ships several kilometers away and set waypoints in the nav computer. As Alema and [[Lumiya]] joined forces to attack the Solos and the Skywalkers, the ''Duracrud'' began to accelerate towards the dome, smashing through it and the floor beneath it, punching through the station's axis.
